flags.query: What is the current bid-ask spread, midpoint, and implied Yes probability for the 'Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of April?' market?
Show the current outcome prices and 24h volume for the 'US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 30, 2026?' market.
Fetch the full market parameters (tick size, min order size, neg-risk flag, fee structure) for the 'Will Jon Stewart win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?' market.
What are the resolution rules, source-of-truth, and end date for the 'US obtains Iranian enriched uranium by May 31?' market?
Estimate slippage for a $50,000 buy of Yes on the 'Will the U.S. invade Iran before 2027?' market and tell me the fill price vs current midpoint.
Who are the top 10 holders of Yes on the 'Will Jon Stewart win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?' market, what is their combined share, and is concentration bullish or bearish?
Break down whale flow across every sub-market of the 'Democratic Presidential Nominee 2028' event — which candidate markets have the largest single-wallet positions?
For the 'What will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit in April 2026?' event, rank every strike by tradability (liquidity × inverse spread × volume) and tell me the best strike to short.

Find markets on Polymarket with implied probability between 30% and 50%, end date within 14 days, and 24h volume above $500k — include entries like 'US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 30, 2026?' and 'Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of April?' where applicable.
For the 'Warriors vs. Suns' NBA event on Polymarket, which derivative market (spread, total, moneyline, player prop) has the tightest spread relative to its 24h volume?

Compare the Yes-side liquidity and spread across 'US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?', 'US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 30, 2026?', 'US x Iran permanent peace deal by May 31, 2026?', and 'US x Iran permanent peace deal by June 30, 2026?' — which expiry offers the best entry?
Compare outcome probabilities, 24h volume, and orderbook depth for the top 8 teams in the '2026 FIFA World Cup Winner' event on Polymarket.

Compare whale concentration and top-10-holder composition for 'Will the Oklahoma City Thunder win the 2026 NBA Finals?' vs 'Will the Cleveland Cavaliers win the 2026 NBA Finals?' vs 'Will the New York Knicks win the 2026 NBA Finals?' — where is smart money most concentrated?
Compare 24h volume and implied Yes probability across the Fed outcomes in the 'Fed decision in April?' event on Polymarket, and flag any pricing inconsistent with the sum-to-one constraint.

Run a high-conviction workflow on the 'Will Jon Stewart win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?' market: pull rules, current midpoint/spread, top-holder concentration, 7-day price history, and give me a one-page memo with a recommendation and max sizing given $25k risk.

Build a tradability memo for the 'Israel x Hezbollah ceasefire by April 18, 2026?' market covering resolution risk, current liquidity, recent whale moves, and whether the current Yes price leaves any edge for a late-entry No bet.

Browse the 'Fed interest rates' category and the 'Crypto' category on Polymarket, rank the top 5 markets by 24h volume in each, and produce a combined watchlist with implied probabilities and end dates.

Find the highest-expected-value arbitrage opportunity in the 'Republican Presidential Nominee 2028' neg-risk event on Polymarket: check if the sum of all candidate Yes midpoints exceeds 1.0, and if so, size a basket short trade that fits within $100k risk given current book depth on the top legs (e.g., Donald Trump, J.D. Vance, Rand Paul).

Construct a portfolio of 5 moderate-probability (30-60% Yes) Polymarket bets ending within 60 days, drawn from current top markets including 'Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of April?' and 'US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 30, 2026?' — size each leg to equal-risk, avoid correlated bets, and output expected portfolio volatility and sharpe.
